transcript:
CALLER: Hi, umm, I had an appointment tomorrow morning and I need to, uh, cancel it actually.
AGENT: Sure, I can help with that. May I have your name and registered phone number?
CALLER: It's Rohit Sharma. Phone number is 9765432100.
AGENT: Thank you, Mr. Sharma. I can see your appointment with Dr. Ajay Kulkarni tomorrow at 10:30 AM. Would you like to cancel it completely or reschedule to another date?
CALLER: Just cancel for now. I'll call back when I'm free next week maybe.
AGENT: Understood. Your appointment has been cancelled. Whenever you're ready, feel free to call us back and we'll find a suitable slot. Is there anything else I can do for you?
CALLER: No, that's it. Thanks.
AGENT: Of course, take care!
